allowed_context.goal: Define and scaffold the Generator handoff flow so Analyst can invoke Claude CLI without sharing overlapping Analyst/Researcher context.
success_criteria: The Analyst-to-Generator handoff contract is documented with allowed and forbidden context.
The Claude CLI invocation model is documented as fresh, task-scoped execution.
The expected Generator input and output artifacts are specified.
Ledger events for Generator instruction and result capture are specified.
Validation instructions for the next Validator handoff remain compatible with Tier 2 and Tier 3 flows.
Repository audits pass for the changed harness files.

positive: Use task-scoped handoff input for Claude CLI Generator invocation.
Keep Researcher output routed through Analyst.
Record command shape and artifact paths in the task ledger.
negative: Do not pass the full Analyst conversation to Generator.
Do not use claude --continue or claude --resume.
Do not use permission bypass flags.
Do not include secrets, credentials, PII, or environment variable values.
Do not modify product runtime behavior.

research_summary.summary: No external research was required. Local Claude CLI help confirmed support for --print, --bare, --input-format, --output-format, --no-session-persistence, --permission-mode, --allowedTools, and --disallowedTools.

snippets.snippet: Claude Code starts interactive by default; use -p/--print for non-interactive output.

ledger_events: TASK-20260427-091 established the isolated Claude CLI invocation boundary.
TASK-20260427-092 was created to implement the handoff contract in harness docs.
session_excerpts: Generator는 Claude CLI의 새 실행 세션으로 호출한다. Analyst 대화 전체를 넘기지 않고 task-scoped handoff 파일만 전달해 컨텍스트 중첩을 방지한다.

forbidden_context: Secrets, credentials, PII, or environment variable values
